violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth or sanitizer solution for wiping food spills was not clean. -Food debris on cloth at back prep table.
Laundering of linens. — --Linens left in washing machine overnight and throughout day-should mechanically dried ASAP after completing wash cycle.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -Top layer of foods in small prep table found with temperatures fo 51-64F. *Directed to close top lid between use and to dispose of top 3 portions of chicken wings found over 60F.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Small amount of residue at makeline underside handles and at handle of walk in cooler. -Dust/debris at walk in cooler fans.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. -Dish pit apron stored hanging on clean dishes storage rack. -Jacket left on top of sleeve of pizza boxes.--Lockers or other suitable facilities were not provided for the orderly storage of employees' clothing/possessions.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
